meta.title: A&A Logistics — The best of 4PL
meta.description: A&A Logistics — leading 4PL provider delivering integrated logistics solutions and wood products for domestic and export markets.

hero.title: Together Building The Best.
hero.description: Established in 2005, AAlog Corporation specializes in providing plywood and associated products to partners and clients in Vietnam and export markets.
hero.productsList: Rubberwood Veneer  |  Eucalyptus Veneer  |  Acacia Veneer  |  Pine Veneer

vision.title: To be a market leader of preferred wood and associated products
vision.lead: Providing innovative solutions in construction and architectural design.
items: Leading position in the national and regional market through innovation and a well-known brand.
Being a sustainable leading manufacturer in the region.
Constantly renewed to bring suitable solutions to customers.

aboutUs.title: Our story
aboutUs.desc: AAlog's founder is on the factory floor every day — inspecting each batch of veneer, working side by side with the technical team, and staying close to every customer. Our working style is straightforward: we deliver what we promise, quality comes before price, and we build long-term partnerships instead of chasing short-term orders.

privateLabel.title: Let Us Be Your PRIVATE LABEL PARTNER
privateLabel.desc: We always work toward our customers' success. With flexible production capacity and an experienced engineering team, AAlog is ready to walk with you in building your own brand — from packaging design to technical specifications.

experiencePreview.title: Our journey
experiencePreview.desc: Photos of products, customers, container loading, and export documents — proof of more than 20 years of industry experience.

plywoodPreview.title: 4 core veneer lines
plywoodPreview.desc: From rubberwood, eucalyptus, acacia to pine — meeting diverse export requirements.

items.name: Binh Duong 01 Factory
items.desc: Our 55,000 m² affiliated factory is equipped with the most state-of-the-art facilities in the FFP industry. Offerings are EN 13986 (CE) certified and obtain TÜV Rheinland certification.

items.name: Binh Duong 02 Factory
items.desc: Opened in 2019, BD2 is more automated and specialized in plywood for furniture and other industries, including premium RTA Kitchen Cabinets.

milestones.title: Our Journey
milestones.subtitle: In each step of operation, AAlog is striving for consistent coordination with our partners.

items.title: Manufacturing — FFP
items.desc: Operated FFP production with 12,000 cbm/year capacity.

items.title: Binh Duong 1 — Phase 1
items.desc: Opened new facility with 60,000 cbm/year capacity.

items.title: Binh Duong 2 — Phase 1
items.desc: New product portfolio: furniture plywood, floor base — 84,000 cbm/year.

hero.title: Four core veneer lines
hero.description: From rubberwood, eucalyptus, acacia to pine — AAlog supplies diverse raw materials to furniture and export customers worldwide.

certifications.title: Complete legal paperwork for export
certifications.subtitle: AAlog provides all required documents for every export shipment.

items.name: Legal Forestry Records
items.desc: Proof of legal timber origin per Vietnam regulations and EUTR.

items.name: Certificate of Origin
items.desc: Origin certificate for ASEAN — China preferential tariff treatment.

items.name: Phytosanitary Certificate
items.desc: Confirms shipment is pest-free and meets the destination country's import rules.

items.name: Fumigation Certificate
items.desc: ISPM 15 fumigation treatment for wood packaging and wood products.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.description: Thank you for contacting AAlog. We commit to respond to all inquiries within 72 working hours.
